messages.text: Heads up team - we have a production deployment scheduled for today. Alice will be handling it. v2.4.0 going live!
QA sign-off complete for v2.4.0. All tests passed. Good to deploy.

Hey Alice, quick note about the deployment - please make sure the deployment log includes both the old version (2.3.0) and new version (2.4.0) numbers for our change tracking. Also, the backup is important today because we had some config changes in this release. Thanks!
One more thing - after you post to #devops, can you also send me a quick confirmation email? I need it for the release documentation. Appreciate it!
